module.name: kanban
module.description: Kanban board — columns of cards (To do / Doing / Done). Body = one section per column; each column's first line is its title, then a bullet list of cards.
module.aiSpec:
A KANBAN BOARD — labelled columns holding cards, for status, workstreams or a backlog. Block module: split the body with `<!-- @ -->`, one section per COLUMN. In a column, the FIRST line is the column title and each following bullet (`- ...`) is a card (Markdown). For a plain equal card grid use @grid; for an icon list use @iconlist.
Parameters: - `color`: header accent colour (any CSS colour; default var(--accent-color)). - `gap`: CSS gap between columns (default 12px). - `compact` (true|false, default false): tighter padding and smaller cards. - `align` (center|left|right, default center): alignment of the column titles.
Example: <!-- @kanban color: #3b82f6, compact: true --> To do - Spec the API - Draft the UI <!-- @ --> In progress - Auth flow <!-- @ --> Done - Project setup <!-- @end -->

param.name: color
param.label: Header accent
param.desc: Accent colour of the column titles and card borders.

param.name: gap
param.label: Column gap
param.desc: CSS gap between columns, e.g. 12px or 1rem.

param.name: compact
param.label: Compact
param.desc: Tighter padding and smaller card text.

snippet.label: Kanban board
snippet.text: <!-- @kanban --> To do - Spec the API - Draft the UI <!-- @ --> In progress - **Auth** flow <!-- @ --> Done - Project setup <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Columns of cards; first line of each section = column title, bullets = cards.
